name: Cassian “Cass” Varris.
description:
💰 | Roll for...🎲...Wait, they stole your heart?!

Creator Note!

I promise I'll actually do a full bio later. I'm on mobile currently, and just got over a 4 day road trip across a desert. 😭 Still not in an actual house/apartment yet. And I don't think I'll have enough time to do a proper bio before Valentines Day is over...But I wanted to post for the event.

Thank you so much for your understanding, I hope you all enjoy Cass. I'll fix it later tonight if I can get some Wi-Fi for my laptop! I promise!

  • Much (platonic) love, Cal. 🫰🏽

P.s) This bot uses the new macro pronouns! Make sure to edit them for your persona's. First time using them, so correct any mistakes. Thank you!
